name: SOMEIP_InjectPDU
title: SOMEIP_InjectPDU
syntax: long SOMEIP_InjectPDU(PDU pdu, long channel, IP_Endpoint srcIPEndpoint, IP_Endpoint dstIPEndpoint);
description: Injects the PDU into the SOME/IP-Binding block, where its then send.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel of the network where the PDU should be injected.

parameters.name: srcIPEndpoint
parameters.description: IP endpoint of the PDU sender.

parameters.name: dstIPEndpoint
parameters.description: IP endpoint of the PDU receiver.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
